human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for multi-property portfolio behavior, planning and allocation boundaries, accommodation-specific evidence, functionality coverage, research grounding, and runtime-specification-based posture.

review_notes: No functional, research, or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

All required scenario families and escalation families are represented, including demand exceeding capacity, conflicting priorities, final approval refusal, high-volume intake, policy-aware customer exceptions, safety or fraud escalation, conflicting policy handling, and tenant adaptation.

notes: validated conditions are met for the recommendation-only accommodation and travel services multi-property operations specialist.
